stemHtml: You are about to land. Which is the best runway without wake turbulence?

options.a: RWY 33R, 10 kt wind northerly, light airplane in front of you.
options.b: RWY 22, Boeing 777 lands in front of you, calm wind.
options.c: RWY 05, A318 lands in front of you, slight crosswind.
options.d: RWY 33L, 10 kt wind northerly, helicopter lands first.
